findings.description: Invoice.builderId -> Builder.id: 22 orphan rows
findings.impact: Invoices with no builder — AR aging & collections broken.

findings.description: Invoice.amountPaid disagrees with SUM(Payment.amount) on 7+ rows.
findings.impact: Cash applied is misreported. Over/underpayment reports wrong. Collection tickets may chase paid invoices (or miss unpaid ones).
findings.fix_sql:
UPDATE "Invoice" i
SET "amountPaid" = COALESCE(p.paid,0),
    "balanceDue" = i."total" - COALESCE(p.paid,0),
    "updatedAt" = now()
FROM (
  SELECT "invoiceId", SUM("amount")::float AS paid FROM "Payment" GROUP BY "invoiceId"
) p
WHERE p."invoiceId" = i."id" AND ABS(COALESCE(i."amountPaid",0) - COALESCE(p.paid,0)) > 0.01;

findings.description: Order.subtotal disagrees with SUM(OrderItem.lineTotal) by >$0.01 on 200+ rows (capped at 200).
findings.impact: Sales reports and AR aging may show wrong totals; syncs to QuickBooks/InFlow may replay stale values.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Recompute Order.subtotal from OrderItem.lineTotal sums
UPDATE "Order" o
SET "subtotal" = sub.derived,
    "total" = sub.derived + COALESCE(o."taxAmount",0) + COALESCE(o."shippingCost",0),
    "updatedAt" = now()
FROM (
  SELECT "orderId" AS id, COALESCE(SUM("lineTotal"),0) AS derived
  FROM "OrderItem" GROUP BY "orderId"
) sub
WHERE o."id" = sub.id AND ABS(o."subtotal" - sub.derived) > 0.01;

findings.description: PurchaseOrder.subtotal disagrees with SUM(PurchaseOrderItem.lineTotal) on 60+ rows.
findings.impact: Vendor spend and AP accruals may be wrong; purchasing dashboards miscategorize.
findings.fix_sql:
UPDATE "PurchaseOrder" p
SET "subtotal" = COALESCE(sub.derived,0),
    "total" = COALESCE(sub.derived,0) + COALESCE(p."shippingCost",0),
    "updatedAt" = now()
FROM (
  SELECT "purchaseOrderId" AS id, COALESCE(SUM("lineTotal"),0) AS derived
  FROM "PurchaseOrderItem" GROUP BY "purchaseOrderId"
) sub
WHERE sub.id = p."id" AND ABS(COALESCE(p."subtotal",0) - COALESCE(sub.derived,0)) > 0.01;

findings.description: PurchaseOrder.total disagrees with subtotal + shippingCost on 5+ rows.
findings.impact: AP / cash flow forecast miscalculated.

findings.description: InventoryItem.onOrder disagrees with open PO line quantities on 186+ SKUs.
findings.impact: Reorder suggestions & auto-purchase recommendations will be wrong.
findings.fix_sql:
UPDATE "InventoryItem" i
SET "onOrder" = COALESCE(v.open_qty,0), "updatedAt" = now()
FROM (
  SELECT poi."productId", SUM(GREATEST(COALESCE(poi."quantity",0) - COALESCE(poi."receivedQty",0), 0))::int AS open_qty
  FROM "PurchaseOrderItem" poi JOIN "PurchaseOrder" po ON po."id" = poi."purchaseOrderId"
  WHERE po."status" IN ('DRAFT','PENDING_APPROVAL','APPROVED','SENT_TO_VENDOR','PARTIALLY_RECEIVED') AND poi."productId" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY poi."productId"
) v
WHERE v."productId" = i."productId" AND COALESCE(i."onOrder",0) <> COALESCE(v.open_qty,0);
-- Also zero out SKUs with no open PO lines:
UPDATE "InventoryItem" SET "onOrder" = 0, "updatedAt" = now()
WHERE COALESCE("onOrder",0) <> 0 AND "productId" NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT poi."productId" FROM "PurchaseOrderItem" poi
  JOIN "PurchaseOrder" po ON po."id" = poi."purchaseOrderId"
  WHERE po."status" IN ('DRAFT','PENDING_APPROVAL','APPROVED','SENT_TO_VENDOR','PARTIALLY_RECEIVED') AND poi."productId" IS NOT NULL
);

findings.description: PurchaseOrder.orderedAt after receivedAt on 128+ rows.
findings.impact: Impossible — received before ordered. Skews vendor lead-time metrics.
findings.fix_sql:
-- No universal fix. Inspect and decide to clear one of the fields:
-- SELECT "id","orderedAt","receivedAt" FROM "PurchaseOrder" WHERE "orderedAt" > "receivedAt" LIMIT 50;

findings.description: 1 distinct companyName (case-insensitive, trimmed) with duplicates — 3 rows total.
findings.impact: Orders/invoices split across builder copies; AR/margin reports undercount per builder; credit hold logic bypassed if wrong shell is referenced.

findings.description: Invoice.issuedAt is NULL on 3 rows where status != DRAFT — issued invoices must have issue date.
findings.impact: DSO and aging calculations miscount these invoices.

findings.description: PurchaseOrder.orderedAt is NULL on 42 rows where status is past approval — should be set when PO goes to vendor.
findings.impact: Vendor lead-time metrics miscalculated.

findings.description: 204 Deliveries with status=COMPLETE but completedAt IS NULL.
findings.impact: OTD metric and delivery throughput mis-measured.

findings.description: 3198 Orders in DELIVERED state without a linked Invoice.
findings.impact: Revenue delivered but not billed — unbilled revenue / missed AR.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Investigate. Possibly needs invoice auto-gen. Sample list:
-- SELECT "id","orderNumber","builderId","total" FROM "Order" WHERE "status" = 'DELIVERED' AND "id" NOT IN (SELECT "orderId" FROM "Invoice" WHERE "orderId" IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 50;

findings.description: 5 DRAFT invoices have Payments attached (impossible in normal flow).
findings.impact: Payment applied to unfinalized invoice. Likely revenue reported in wrong period.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Move these invoices to ISSUED or PAID based on payments:
UPDATE "Invoice" i
SET "status" = CASE WHEN COALESCE(i."amountPaid",0) >= COALESCE(i."total",0) - 0.01 THEN 'PAID' ELSE 'ISSUED' END,
    "issuedAt" = COALESCE(i."issuedAt", i."createdAt"),
    "updatedAt" = now()
WHERE i."status" = 'DRAFT' AND i."id" IN (SELECT DISTINCT "invoiceId" FROM "Payment");

findings.description: 200 POs marked RECEIVED but at least one line is under-received.
findings.impact: Inventory-on-order will be wrong; receipt shouldn't have closed the PO.

findings.description: 200+ Orders with paymentStatus=PAID but no linked PAID Invoice.
findings.impact: Order marks itself as paid with no accounting evidence. Accounts may appear current that aren't.
findings.fix_sql: -- Spot-check: SELECT "id","orderNumber","paymentStatus","total" FROM "Order" WHERE "paymentStatus" = 'PAID' LIMIT 50;

findings.description: Invoice.total differs from linked Order.total by >$0.01 on 108+ rows.
findings.impact: Acceptable if invoice was partially invoiced or adjusted, but should be reviewed.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Manual review. Invoice may intentionally differ (change orders, partial invoicing). Spot-check:
-- SELECT i."id", i."total" AS inv, o."total" AS ord FROM "Invoice" i JOIN "Order" o ON o."id" = i."orderId" WHERE ABS(i."total" - o."total") > 0.01 LIMIT 50;

findings.description: Job.actualDate earlier than the linked Order.createdAt on 13+ rows.
findings.impact: Impossible — job done before order created. Likely stale/imported date.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Investigate each row; may be a legacy import artifact. No auto-fix.
-- SELECT j."id", j."actualDate", o."createdAt" FROM "Job" j JOIN "Order" o ON o."id"=j."orderId" WHERE j."actualDate" < o."createdAt" LIMIT 50;

findings.description: 441 Orders have zero OrderItems.
findings.impact: Could be forecast/placeholder orders, or broken imports. Review.
findings.fix_sql:
-- Investigate. For forecast/placeholder orders this may be legitimate.
-- SELECT "id","orderNumber","status","total","isForecast","createdAt" FROM "Order" WHERE "id" IN (SELECT o."id" FROM "Order" o LEFT JOIN "OrderItem" oi ON oi."orderId" = o."id" WHERE oi."id" IS NULL) LIMIT 50;

findings.description: 37 PurchaseOrders with zero PurchaseOrderItems.
findings.impact: Empty PO shells; may be legacy seed or canceled drafts.
findings.fix_sql: -- SELECT "id","poNumber","vendorId","status","source","createdAt" FROM "PurchaseOrder" WHERE "id" NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT "purchaseOrderId" FROM "PurchaseOrderItem") LIMIT 50;

findings.description: 69/3759 PurchaseOrders have orderedAt IS NULL.
findings.impact: AP aging & lead-time reporting miscount.
findings.fix_sql:
-- For non-draft POs, backfill from createdAt (see check E):
-- UPDATE "PurchaseOrder" SET "orderedAt" = "createdAt" WHERE "orderedAt" IS NULL AND "status" NOT IN ('DRAFT','PENDING_APPROVAL','CANCELLED');

findings.description: Order.orderDate year distribution: 2024:786, 2025:2044, 2026:821
findings.impact: Informational — verify there are no surprise gaps or outlier years.

findings.description: 200+ Orders in DELIVERED state with no Delivery record via any linked Job.
findings.impact: Fulfilment audit trail is thin — we know it delivered but can't show when/where.
findings.fix_sql: -- Spot-check. Not always a bug — some legacy orders predate Delivery tracking.

findings.description: 119 Jobs in COMPLETE/INVOICED/CLOSED state without a Delivery record.
findings.impact: Completion tracked without fulfilment evidence. Legacy jobs may predate Delivery entity.
findings.fix_sql: -- Spot-check: SELECT "id","jobNumber","builderName","status","createdAt" FROM "Job" WHERE "status" IN ('COMPLETE','INVOICED','CLOSED') AND "id" NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT "jobId" FROM "Delivery") LIMIT 50;
